text: If you discover a fire in the engine room or galley space, what should your immediate first step be?

options.text: Attempt to extinguish the fire entirely on your own
Locate and read the emergency instruction manual
Report the situation and sound the emergency fire alarm
Evacuate directly to the lifeboat station without notifying anyone

explanation: In any emergency, the primary rule is to notify others immediately by sounding the alarm to activate the ship's emergency response team. Attempting to fight a fire alone without assistance is dangerous and violates standard emergency procedures.
